title: The Classic Script
description: This is a single-player horror modpack throws you into a creepy, unpredictable world where everythink feels alive. Survival won’t be easy, because something is always watching.
body:
![The Classic Script](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87ca86997daae1efcfdae34bd45021d16fa49a1d.png)

### ---What is this modpack, and what does it do?---
This modpack focuses on an ARG horror experience. This modpack is intended to be slowburn, it can take hours for major events to progress, and this is intentional.




### Based on the mod "The Broken Script".


### ---MULTIPLAYER SUPPORT---
This Modpack CAN be used in multiPlayer, BUT they will be bugs with the main mod, "The Broken Script", such like
  1. Bugs in Client-Side Events
  2. Event engine breaking (events progress unpredictably)
  3. Unsolicited world corruption
  4. Lag (in some cases)
It's better to use in Single Player OR remove the "The broken Script" Mod and play with your friends!


Discord Server: https://discord.gg/4ADPnrsGAs
